_comment: Dev/test reserve: 5B NIGHT (5e15 STARS) covers default faucet funding (~2B NIGHT). The remainder of MAX_SUPPLY lands in locked_pool so c2m-bridge UnlockToTreasury/DistributeNight(CardanoBridge) inflows have something to draw from. Without this, locked_pool=0 (because fallback for reserve is MAX_SUPPLY, that leaves 0 for locked pool) and any bridge transfer fails with SystemTransactionError::IllegalPayout.
